title: How Blob Analysis Works
description:
How Blob Analysis Works

How Blob Analysis Works

Blob analysis processing takes place in the following steps:

Segmentation

, which consists of
			Thresholding
			Connectivity analysis
			Blob results computation

Segmentation

Histogram Analysis

Pixel Weighting and Spatial Quantization Error

Connectivity (Connected Blob Analysis)

Blob Results Computations
